message:
fix(lowering): replace saturating_add with checked_add for synthetic export counter

Change synthetic_export_index increment from saturating_add(1) to
checked_add(1).expect() — silently saturating at u32::MAX could cause
duplicate binding names and subtle lowering bugs. An explicit panic
on overflow is safer since hitting 2^32 synthetic exports indicates
a real problem, not a recoverable edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
